prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-MEDPENLIGHTS-FL102-4EMT Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal 4pc Warm and White Light EMT Diagnostic Pen Light with Pupil Gauge Description: The ASR Federal Warm and White Light EMT Diagnostic Pen Light with Pupil Gauge and Pocket Clip Set of Four in silver and black are professional grade medical diagnostic pen lights, used to examine eyes, ears, throat, nose and mouth by doctors, nurses, first responders, EMT's and other trauma and medical professionals for health assessments.

The four-piece EMT medical diagnostics pen light set includes two silver pen lights and two black pen lights:

BLACK PEN LIGHT: The black EMT diagnostic pen light features warm lighting, specifically for assessing a person's pupil dilation via the handy pupil gauge, as well as a small 5cm rule for measuring pupil dilation, both found on the exterior body of the pen light tool

SILVER PEN LIGHT: The silver EMT diagnostic pen light features bright white lighting, specifically for assessing the ears, eyes, throat, nose and mouth for any abnormalities

Weighing just 0.2 ouches or 0.0125 pounds, the ASR Federal pen light EMT tool is minimalist and compact in its design; Featuring a sturdy aluminum body, the nursing pen light is lightweight and easily portable. The pen light also includes a handy pocket clip, great for attaching to a pocket or notebook if you're on the go, as well as a push down button to easily and quickly turn the pen light on and off when you need it.

Battery operated, your purchase includes eight (8) AAA batteries so you don't have to worry about the nuisance of carrying USB cables, a battery pack or charging station. The battery-operated feature also makes the pen light a great alternative to a flashlight, tactical, trekking, backpacking or otherwise, or if you're working on home electrical or auto and/or mechanical repairs. Search Terms: pupil gauge emt at home pupil light dialator lab technician THC tool Features: - EMT ESSENTIAL TOOL: This ASR Federal set of four (4) silver and black medical diagnostic penlights are used to examine eyes, ears, throat, nose and mouth by doctors, nurses, first responders, EMT's and other trauma and medical professionals for health assessments; a great tool to carry in your purse, work bag, first aid kit or with your survival gear in case of a medical emergency or a flashlight is needed - BLACK PEN LIGHT: The black EMT diagnostic pen light features warm lighting, specifically for assessing a person's pupil dilation via the handy pupil gauge, as well as a small 5cm rule for measuring pupil dilation, both found on the exterior body of the pen light tool - SILVER PEN LIGHT: The silver EMT diagnostic pen light features bright white lighting, specifically for assessing the ears, eyes, throat, nose and mouth for any abnormalities - MINIMALIST COMPACT DESIGN: Featuring a sturdy aluminum body, the nursing pen light is lightweight and easily portable; the pen light also includes a handy pocket clip, great for attaching to a pocket or notebook, as well as a push down button to easily and quickly turn the pen light on and off - SPECIFICATIONS: Package Includes: two (2) silver pen lights and two black pen lights; Battery Operated: eight (8) AAA batteries included; Dimensions: 5.5 inches long x 0.5 inches wide; Material: aluminum; Weight: 0.2 ounces === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Federal 4-pk Warm White Light EMT Diagnostic Pen Light

openai.item_name: ASR Federal 4-pk Warm And White EMT Diagnostic Pen Light

anthropic.title_differentiation: Pupil Gauge, 2 Silver And 2 Black, Aluminum Body, Pocket Clip, 8 AAA Batteries Included
